parameters.query:
SELECT id, client, email, marketplace, subject, category, order_ref, sla, raw_message, priority, created_at
FROM tickets
WHERE status = 'open'
ORDER BY
  CASE priority
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
    WHEN 'high' THEN 2
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 3
    WHEN 'low' THEN 4
  END,
  created_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

UPDATE tickets SET
  status = '{{ $json.final_status }}',
  category = '{{ $json.ai_category }}',
  priority = '{{ $json.ai_priority }}'
WHERE id = '{{ $json.ticket_id }}';

INSERT INTO agent_actions (ticket_id, action, type, icon)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  'Classifié : {{ $json.ai_category }} — {{ $json.ai_sub_type }} (confiance {{ $json.ai_confidence }}%)',
  'decision',
  '🎯'
);

INSERT INTO messages (ticket_id, role, is_ai, text)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  'agent',
  true,
  '{{ $json.ai_customer_reply.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);

INSERT INTO agent_actions (ticket_id, action, type, icon)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  'Réponse automatique envoyée au client',
  'reply',
  '💬'
),
(
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  'Ticket résolu automatiquement',
  'resolved',
  '✅'
);

INSERT INTO validations (ticket_id, client, marketplace, amount, type, context, agent_quote, priority, sla)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  '{{ $json.client }}',
  '{{ $json.marketplace }}',
  {{ $json.ai_validation.amount || 0 }},
  '{{ ($json.ai_validation.type || "Remboursement").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_validation.context || $json.ai_merchant_summary).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_validation.agent_quote || $json.ai_reasoning).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_priority }}',
  '{{ $json.sla || "Respecté" }}'
);

INSERT INTO messages (ticket_id, role, is_ai, text)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  'agent',
  true,
  '{{ $json.ai_customer_reply.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);

INSERT INTO agent_actions (ticket_id, action, type, icon)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_reasoning || "Validation humaine requise").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'escalation',
  '🔒'
);

INSERT INTO messages (ticket_id, role, is_ai, text)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  'agent',
  true,
  '{{ ($json.ai_customer_reply || "Votre demande a été transférée à notre équipe spécialisée.").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);

INSERT INTO agent_actions (ticket_id, action, type, icon)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_reasoning || "Escalade : confiance insuffisante ou cas complexe").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'escalation',
  '⚠️'
);
